title: CLMS change detection for HD-map maintenance
summary: An OEM used CLMS change detection to target HD-map re-surveys, cutting unnecessary surveys while catching significant changes.
narrative:
## Challenge
HD maps for the OEM's ADAS suite across many countries suffered staleness — roadside changes caused sensor-fusion errors, while calendar-based re-survey was inefficient.

## Approach
Annual CLMS High Resolution Layers and Sentinel-2 change detection flagged land-cover change along corridors, triggering targeted re-survey assignments instead of calendar-based scheduling.

## Results
Over 18 months, unnecessary remapping surveys fell by about a third while detection of significant changes improved. False-positive ADAS alerts from unmapped vegetation growth were eliminated after the first update cycle.
